390 questions in this set
1

According to Constitution of 1962, age limit to cast vote was ___________________?

Correct Answer: 21 Years
Show explanation
Explanation

1962 constitution (250 articles) was promulgated by Ayoub Khan on 1st March 1962

Come into effect 8 June 1962

2

The Pakistan Kidney and Liver Institute (PKLI) conduct first time liver transplant operations under the `swap transplant programme` on:

Correct Answer: 17-03-2022
Show explanation
Explanation

The Pakistan Kidney and Liver Institute (PKLI) is all set to conduct first-time liver transplant operations of three patients under the `swap transplant programme` on March 17, 2022. It will place Pakistan on the list of the countries conducting swap transplant procedures.

3

What is the rank of Pakistan in World Happiness Index 2022?

Correct Answer: 121
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan ranked 121 out of 146 countries on the list of World Happiness Report published by United Nations Sustainable Development Solutions Network, released on 18 March 2022. 

Topper: Finland

Bottom: Afghanistan



4

President of Pakistan launched Asaan Karobar Programme on the date:

Correct Answer: 18-03-2022
Show explanation
Explanation

President Arif Alvi on March 18, 2022 launched the Asaan Karobar Programme saying innovative strategies by incorporating digital technology was essential to ensuring sustainable business activities.

5

In March 2022, UNHCR donated equipment to hospitals of which city?

Correct Answer: Quetta
Show explanation
Explanation

The United Nations High Commission for Refugees (UNHCR) donated a CT scan machine, oxygen plant, 400 KVA generator and solar panels to Fatima Jinnah General and Chest Hospital in Quetta.

 

6

Acclaimed author Sara Suleri passed away on:

Correct Answer: 21-03-2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Sara Suleri Goodyear was Born in 1953 in Karachi.

She died at the age of 69.

7

PM Imran Khan laid the foundation stone of a 200bed Emergency and Trauma Centre at (PIMS) on:

Correct Answer: 21-03-2022
Show explanation
Explanation

After a gap of 37 years, two healthcare centres will be established in the federal capital as Prime Minister Imran Khan laid the foundation stone of a 200bed Emergency and Trauma Centre at the Pakistan Institute of Medical Sciences (PIMS) and a 300-bed hospital in G-11 on 21-03-2022.

The emergency centre will be completed in two years while the hospital will be constructed in 30 months.


Updated: 24-03-2022

8

What is the retirement age in Pakistan?

Correct Answer: 60
Show explanation
Explanation

The retirement age for Government employees in Pakistan is 60 years, as per the Civil Servants Act, 1973 and Rule 13 of Civil Service Rules.

More Details
For armed forces personnel, retirement age varies by rank.
Early retirement is possible after 25 years of service.

پاکستان میں وفاقی سرکاری ملازمین کی ریٹائرمنٹ کی عمر 60 سال مقرر ہے

9

The Salt range is situated between rivers Soan and ____?

Correct Answer: River Jhelum
Show explanation
Explanation

The salt range is situated between rivers Soan and River Jhelum

The highest peak of salt range is Soan Sakaser

The Salt Range is a mountain range in the north of the Punjab province of Pakistan

The range extends along the south of the Potohar Plateau and the north of the Jhelum River.

Sakesar (Khushab District) is the highest mountain in the salt region

675 meters is the average height of the salt range

The Upper Indus plain area is located in the South of the Salt Range and east of Sulemania

******

ND17-7-2023


10

ROs stand for ___________.

Correct Answer: Returning Officers
Show explanation
Explanation

RMS - Result Management System and RO - Returning officers

The RMS is offline software installed in a computer at RO office that also has a trained data entry operator. The RO receives results from presiding officers on Form 45, mostly hard copies and the operator enters results in RMS

RTS - Result Transmission System

The RTS is an entirely different system meant to transmit Form 45 from polling stations to RO offices and the ECP Secretariat using a smartphone

11

One unit was dissolved by

Correct Answer: Yahya khan
Show explanation
Explanation
The One Unit program remained in effect until 1970.
Finally, President General Yahya Khan imposed Legal Framework Order No. 1970 to end the One Unit program and reinstate the provisional status of the Four Provinces as of August 1947.

The National Assembly of Pakistan in 1947 was presided by?

Explanation

Jinnah was the founder of Pakistan.



13

Ahmad Shah Abdali was the general of?

Correct Answer: Nadir Shah Durani
Show explanation
Explanation

Ahmad Shah Abdali was a prominent cavalry general under the Persian emperor Nadir Shah of the Afsharid dynasty


He was the first ruler and founder of the Durrani Empire


Born in 1722 in Afghanistan.


Died on October 16, 1773, in Afghanistan.

ہڑپہ کے کھنڈرات پاکستان کے کس ضلع میں واقع ہیں؟

Correct Answer: ساہیوال
Show explanation
Explanation

ہڑپہ کے کھنڈرات پنجاب میں ساہیوال سے35کلومیٹر مغرب کی جانب چیچہ وطنی شہر سے 15 کلو میٹر پہلے کھدائی کے دوران ملے۔

 1200سال قبل مسیح سے بھی پہلے لکھی جانے والی ہندوئوں کی کتاب رگ وید سے اس شہر کی تاریخ کا اندازہ لگایا گیا ہے۔

ء کا واقع ہے کہ رائے بہادر دیا رام سہنی نے ہڑپا کے مقام پر نے قدیم تہذیب کے چند آثار پائے1921

18

پاکستان کے 1973کے آئین کے تحت قومی اسمبلی کا الیکشن لڑنے کے لیے عمر کی کیا حد مقرر کی گئی ہے؟

Correct Answer: 25 years
Show explanation
Explanation

پاکستان کی قومی اسمبلی 342 نشستوں پر مشتمل ہے جس میں 272 نشستوں پر اراکین براہ راست انتخاب کے ذریعے منتخب ہوتے ہیں

Minimum age for President of Pakistan: 45 Years

Minimum age for Governor of Pakistan: 35 Years

Minimum age for PM of Pakistan: 35 Years

Minimum age for Senator of Pakistan: 30 Years

Minimum age for National Assembly Member: 25 Years


19

According to 19th Amendment judicial commission shall comprise?

Correct Answer: all of them
Show explanation
Explanation
  • the first was the ‘Judicial fee’ (‘JC’), headed by way of the chief Justice of Pakistan and comprising senior judges of the supreme court docket (), chief Justices and senior judges of the excessive Courts (), the legal professional trendy (one), Federal and Provincial regulation Ministers (one) and representatives of the Federal and Provincial Bar Councils (one).
  • The JC turned into to nominate judges for every emptiness. The nominations have been then forwarded to the second discussion board, the ‘Parliamentary Committee’ (‘laptop’), for affirmation.
20

Government declared `normalisation` as Covid-19 settles after two years on which date?

Correct Answer: March 16, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Exactly two years after placing coronavirus-related restrictions, the National Command and Operation Centre (NCOC) on March 16, 2022 announced normalisation, as Covid-19 settled after infecting over 1.5 million people and taking 30,317 lives.

Former cricketer Zaheer Abbas inducted into PCB Hall of Fame on the date:

Correct Answer: March 12, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

 Pakistan batting great Zaheer Abbas was formally inducted into the Pakistan Cricket Boards Hall of Fame on March 12, 2022.

The 74-year-old former batter received his commemorative cap and plaque from PCB chief executive Faisal Hasnain during the lunch break of the second Test between Pakistan and Australia at Karachi`s National Stadium.

China delivered these jets within eight months of the signing of the deal.

32

According to 19h Amendment judges of the high courts and Supreme Court shall be appointed by?

Correct Answer: judicial commission
Show explanation
Explanation

As noted in advance, the manner of appointment of judges inside the high Courts has been changed

after the 18th and 19th amendments. The judges of high Courts are appointed by means of the Judicial

fee and Parliamentary Committee. For appointment of judges of excessive Courts, the Judicial

fee comprise the leader Justice of Pakistan, as Chairman with 4 senior most judges of the

preferrred court docket, one former chief Justice or a retired judge of the ideal courtroom, appointed via the

Chairman, in session with the 4 member judges of preferrred court.

Answer:

D

Show explanation

Pakistan is scheduled to inaugurate its first national emergency helpline 911 on:

Correct Answer: First Ramzan 1443 Hijri
Show explanation
Explanation

Prime Minister Imran Khan will inaugurate Pakistan’s first national emergency helpline – 911­– on first of Ramazan (2022)

All the 36 individual emergency numbers for the provision of emergency services like fire brigade, police, health assistance, disaster recovery and motorway police would be integrated into Pakistan Emergency Helpline (PEHEL)-911.

44

GT Road where located?

Correct Answer: All of these
Show explanation
Explanation

1.       G.T Road was constructed by Sher Shah Suri

2.       G.T. Road stands for Grand Trunk Road

3.       The Grand Trunk Road is formerly known as Uttarapath, Sarak-e-Azam, Badshahi Sarak, Sarak-e-Sher Shah is one of Asia's oldest and longest major roads.

4.       It runs roughly, 3,710 km (2,305 mi) from

Ø    Teknaf, Bangladesh (on the border with Myanmar)

Ø    west to Kabul, Afghanistan,

Ø    passing through Chittagong and Dhaka in Bangladesh,

Ø    Kolkata, Allahabad (Prayagraj), Delhi, and Amritsar in India,

 

Ø    Lahore, Rawalpindi, and Peshawar in Pakistan

Economic Coordination Committee (ECC) of the Cabinet approved __________ subsidy for 19 kitchen items for Ramazan Relief Package?

Correct Answer: Rs 8.28bn
Show explanation
Explanation

The government on 07-03-2022, at a meeting of the Economic Coordination Committee (ECC) of the Cabinet approved Rs8.28bn subsidy for 19 kitchen items for Ramazan Relief Package and Rs3bn for intending overseas Pakistanis to benefit from the flagship Kamyab Pakistan Programme.

46

The government approved _________ billion for PM’s relief package?

Correct Answer: Rs 303 billion
Show explanation
Explanation

The government on 07-03-2022 approved Rs 303 billion worth of a supplementary budget to cover the financing cost of a series of measures – Rs5 per unit cut in electricity rates, partial payments to the oil industry for a price freeze on petroleum products and debt servicing of Naya Pakistan Certificates.

This announcement was made in March 2022.

49

Shah Jahan died in:

Correct Answer: 1666
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Shah Jahan's eldest son, the liberal Dara Shikoh, became regent in 1658, due to his father's contamination.[citation needed] Dara championed a syncretistic Hindu-Muslim subculture. With the assist of the Islamic orthodoxy, however, a more youthful son of Shah Jahan, Aurangzeb (reigned 1658–1707), seized the throne.
  • Aurangzeb defeated Dara in 1659 and had him completed. although Shah Jahan fully recovered from his illness, Aurangzeb stored Shah Jahan imprisoned until his death in 1666.
  •  sixty eight  at some stage in Aurangzeb's reign, the empire gained political strength all over again and have become the sector's most powerful financial system.[citation needed] Aurangzeb oversaw an increase inside the Islamicization of the Mughal nation. He endorsed conversion to Islam, reinstated the jizya on non-Muslims, and compiled the Fatwa Alamgiri, a set of Islamic law.
50

Shah Jahan became emperor of India in:

Correct Answer: 1628
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Shah Jahān, also spelled Shāhjahān or Shah Jehan, additionally called (until 1628) Prince Khurram, unique name Shihāb al-Dīn Muḥammad Khurram, (born January 5, 1592, Lahore [now in Pakistan]—died January 22, 1666, Agra [now in India]), Mughal emperor of India (1628–fifty eight) who built the Taj Mahal.

Correct Answer: 1636

Explanation

Harvard University has the title of America's most seasoned learning institution, established in 1636. At its initiation, this university's title was “New College,” and its reason was primarily to teach clergy. In 1639, the school's title got to be Harvard College, so named for the Rev. John Harvard.

Blue poppy is the national flower of:

Correct Answer: Bhutan

Explanation

A

ANS:

The blue poppy, Bhutan's national flower,  grows the rough territory over the tree line. At one time just like the sasquatch it was considered a myth since its presence was not affirmed. George Sherriff, a British botanist, found the plant within the farther mountain locale of Skating in eastern Bhutan.

Correct Answer: Black Orchid
Show explanation
Explanation

A

ANS:

The Black Orchid (Encyclia Cochleatum) is the National Flower of Belize. This orchid grows on trees in moist regions, and blossoms about all year circular. Its clustered bulblike stems change in estimate up to six inches long and carry two or three takes off.

B

ANS:

As the leader of the movement for about half a century, he established the Fatah organization in 1958 and got to be the chairman of the Palestinian Freedom Organization in 1969.

At the time tragedy of Karbala occurred, which dynasty was ruling the Islamic world2

Correct Answer: Umayyad

Explanation

B

ANS:

The Fight of Karbala (Arabic: مَعْرَكَة كَرْبَلَاء) was battled on 10 October 680 (10 Muharram within the year 61 Ok of the Islamic calendar) between the armed force of the moment Umayyad Caliph Yazid I and a little armed force driven by Husayn ibn Ali, the grandson of the Islamic prophet Muhammad, at Karbala, cutting edge day Iraq.

he 1976 United States presidential election was the 48th quadrennial presidential race. It was held on Tuesday, November 2, 1976. Correct Answer: Khurshid Qasoori
Show explanation
Explanation

Author Khurshid Mahmud Kasuri

Language English

Genre Nonfiction

Publisher Oxford University Press Pakistan

Publication date 2015

Khurshid Mahmud Kasuri is a Pakistani politician and writer

He served as the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Pakistan between November 2002 until November 2007.

72

Who became the Governor-General of British India in 1910?

Correct Answer: Lord Hardinge
Show explanation
Explanation

C

ANS:

A grandson of Lord Hardinge, governor-general of India in 1844–48, Charles Hardinge entered the conciliatory benefit in 1880. Appointed minister to Russia in 1904 and lasting beneath secretary for remote issues in 1906, he was raised to the peerage and designated emissary of India in 1910.

73

Which team became the first team in the PSL history to finish with just one win and lost nine of its 10 games?

Correct Answer: Karachi Kings
Show explanation
Explanation

Karachi Kings have overall 43 defeats in seven editions of PSL, which is the most number of defeats. Previously, this record was with Quetta Gladiators who had lost eight matches in a single edition.

74

Who becomes Pakistan’s first Sikh citizen to get a PHD degree?

Correct Answer: Kalyan Singh
Show explanation
Explanation

Kalyan Singh received his Ph.D. degree from the Punjab University under the guidance of prominent Punjabi language researcher Prof Dr. Naveed Shehzad. 

75

Who became KP’s first woman Assistant Inspector general (AIG)?

Correct Answer: Ayesha Gul
Show explanation
Explanation

Ayesha Gul, a female police officer in Peshawar, has been appointed as AIG for the first time in Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Police history. 

76

Free meal programme has recently been launched in how many primary schools?

Correct Answer: 100
Show explanation
Explanation

Education Minister Shafqat Mahmood in February 2022 inaugurated the free lunch programme in 100 primary schools of the federal capital.

77

Senate passed Healthcare Facilities Management Authority Bill 2022 on the date:

Correct Answer: February 24, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

The Islamabad Healthcare Facilities Management Authority Bill, 2022 was passed by the Senate Standing Committee on National Health Services (NHS) on February 24, 2022.


The bill seeks to provide better management, supervision and administration of healthcare facilities in the jurisdiction of Islamabad Capital Territory (ICT).


78

___________________ has recently approved $1.2bn for Pakistan in February 2022.

Correct Answer: ITFC
Show explanation
Explanation

 The International Islamic Trade Finance Corporation (ITFC), a member of the Islamic Development Bank, has approved a $1.2 billion financing under the annual plan to provide Pakistan integrated trade solutions to support the energy and agriculture sectors.


79

Government of Pakistan's fiscal policies is related to ________?

Correct Answer: Tax and Expenditure
Show explanation
Explanation

Government of Pakistan fiscal policies related to Tax and Expenditure.

حکومت پاکستان کی مالیاتی پالیسیاں ٹیکس اور اخراجات سے متعلق ہیں۔



80

Fiscal policy addresses :

Correct Answer: both
Show explanation
Explanation

Fiscal policy addresses taxation and government spending, and it is generally determined by government legislation

81

What is the rank of Pakistan in ICC Men’s T20I Team Rankings?

Correct Answer: Third
Show explanation
Explanation

According to ICC Men’s T20I Team Rankings, Pakistan are third with 266 points.

This ranking was released in February 2022.

82

Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act, 2016 (Peca) ordinance was promulgated on:

Correct Answer: February 20, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

President Dr Arif Alvi on 20-02-2022 promulgated an ordinance to amend the Prevention of Electronic Crimes Act, 2016 (Peca) against "fake news".

83

Who came to Pakistan after the earthquake as a special representative of UNO's earthquake relief?

Correct Answer: George Bush Sr
Show explanation
Explanation

Former U.S. President George H. W. Bush was appointed by UN Secretary-General Kofi Annan as the Special Envoy for the South Asian Earthquake Disaster after the devastating 2005 quake in Pakistan

Arrived in Pakistan on January 16, 2006, 

Additional information:

The significant earthquake that prompted major UNO relief efforts, particularly in 2005 in Pakistan/Kashmi

Magnitude: 7.6.

Date: October 8, 2005.

Occurred at 08:50:39 Pakistan Standard Time 

More than 80,000 people perished as a result of the quake,

Cuba dispatched a large medical contingent, 

84

According to the PTA data, which of the following is best network in Pakistan?

Correct Answer: Zong
Show explanation
Explanation

Zong ranked top as the best mobile network of Pakistan, followed by Telenor at 2nd place, Jazz 3rd place and Ufone at the 4th place.

85

Pakistan hockey player Abdul Waheed Khan passed away on:

Correct Answer: February 21, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Eminent Olympian Abdul Waheed Khan, one of the two survivors of 1960 Rome Olympics gold medal-winning Pakistan hockey team, died on February 21, 2022 at the age of 87 in Karachi.


86

PM Imran Khan announced zero tax for IT freelancers on:

Correct Answer: February 21, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Prime Minister Imran Khan on February 21, 2022 announced a zero tax rate for freelancers in the information technology sector.


87

James Faulkner has recently decided to quit from Pakistan Super League. He belonged to the country:

Correct Answer: Australia
Show explanation
Explanation

He belonged to Australia.

88

The Jesuit missionary, who held personal discussions with Akbar and has written an interesting account of him was:

Correct Answer: Antony Monserrate
Show explanation
Explanation

Answer:

B


89

The Zoroastrian practices adopted by Akbar were:

Correct Answer: Adoption of Parsi festival Naoroz
Show explanation
Explanation

Answer:

A


90

Answer:

Correct Answer: The disgruntled nobles and officers declared Akbar's half-brother Mirza Hakim their ruler
Show explanation
Explanation

Answer:

A

The greatest crisis  Akbar faced in 1580 was when disgruntled aristocrats and officers declared Akbar's half-brother, Mirzahakim, as ruler. The most valuable acquisition of Akbar on the northwest frontier was Kandahar. After conquering Asirgarh in 1601, Akbar renamed Kadesh to Dandesh.

91

Shuddhi movement was started in which year?

Correct Answer: 1923
Show explanation
Explanation

In 1923, Swami Shraddhanand founded the 'Bhartiya Hindu Shuddhi Mahasabha' (Indian Hindu Purification Council) and pushed the agenda of reconversion, which eventually created a flashpoint between Hindus and Muslims as Hindus were the recipients of the violence.


92

Sir syed ahmad khan strated and awakening movement for Muslims after the war of indepdence in ,1857 known as :

Correct Answer: Aligarh Movement
Show explanation
Explanation
  • Sir Syed Ahmad Khan started a movement after 1857 known as the Aligarh Movement.
  • The movement is often cited as the foundation for the "Two-Nation Theory." 
  •  It aimed to improve the educational status of Indian Muslims

Last updated question NS on 10 MAY 2026


93

In which year was Muhammad Ghori stabbed to death?

Correct Answer: 1206
Show explanation
Explanation

Muhammad of Ghor was the Sultan of the Ghurid Empire
Along with his brother Ghiyath ad-Din Muhammad, from 1173 to 1202.

Sole ruler from 1202 to 1206.

Born: 1149, Ghor, Afghanistan

Assassinated: March 15, 1206.

Buried: April 10, 1206.

94

Sulaiman, the magnificent invaded Vienna in?

Correct Answer: 1529
Show explanation
Explanation

Suleiman the Magnificent invaded Vienna in 1529, during the first siege of Vienna.

This siege, which lasted for just over two weeks (September 27 to October 15, 1529)

The area of Karakoram range is:

Correct Answer: 77,154 km²

Correct Answer: 2000
Show explanation
Explanation

This announcement was made 9th  February 2022.

107

According to a recent report, _____________ is the most polluted river in the world.

Correct Answer: Ravi
Show explanation
Explanation

River Ravi in Pakistan is the most polluted river in the world, followed by water bodies in Bolivia and Ethiopia.

The Ravi River is a transboundary river crossing northwestern India and eastern Pakistan.

It is one of five rivers associated with the Punjab region

Length: 720 km (450 mi)

The Ravi was known as Purushni or Irawati to Indians in Vedic times and as Hydrates to the Ancient Greeks.


NA21-8-2023

Correct Answer: 218 members

 Britain's Prime Minister from 1945 to 1951.

Correct Answer: Mohammad Yousuf

Explanation

118

The ECP disqualified Faisal Vawda as a lawmaker on:

Correct Answer: February 9th 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

The Election Commission of Pakistan (ECP)  the verdict in PTI leader Faisal Vawda's dual nationality case, disqualifying him as a lawmaker.

Faisal Vawda had resigned as an MNA in March 2021, on the day of Senate election, but he will no longer be a Senator after the conclusion of his disqualification case.

Vawda had won the 2018 general election from Karachi's NA-249 constituency.

Correct Answer: Col Rafi Ud Din

Explanation

Syed Yousaf Raza Gillani has become the leader of opposition in Senate with the support of _________ members?

Correct Answer: 30
Show explanation
Explanation

Syed Yousaf Raza Gillani has become the leader of opposition in Senate on 26-03-2021 with the support of 30 members.

PPP = 21

ANP= 02

JI = 01

FATA = 02

Independent = 04

Total = 30


He resigned on 31-01-2022.

122

Yousuf Raza Gilani resigned as the Leader of the Opposition in the Senate on:

Correct Answer: 31th January 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

PPP leader Yousuf Raza Gilani became leader of the Opposition in the Senate of Pakistan in March 2021 and resigned on 31-01-2022.

He served as 18th prime minister of Pakistan from 25 March 2008 to 26 April 2012.



123

Senate passed the National Metrology Institute of Pakistan Bill on:

Correct Answer: 28-01-2022
Show explanation
Explanation

The bill was passed by National Assembly on Jan 13, 2022 but it was passed in Senate on 28-01-2022.

The bill was pending since 1997.


124

Pakistan Navy Ship (PNS) Alamgir visited Dar es Salaam, located in which country?

Correct Answer: Tanzania
Show explanation
Explanation

Pakistan Navy Ship (PNS) Alamgir visited Dar es Salaam, Tanzania, as part of the overseas deployment in Africa and established a free medical camp as a goodwill gesture from the people of Pakistan in January 2022.




125

Former chief justice of Pakistan Nazim Hussain Siddiqui passed away on:

Correct Answer: January 15, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Nazim Hussain Siddiqui became the chief justice of Pakistan in December 2003, he died at the age of 81 on 15-01-2022. 



126

Chief Minister Khalid Khurshid Khan on _____ inaugurated Gilgit-Baltistan`s first cancer hospital.

Correct Answer: January 14, 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

Chief Minister Khalid Khurshid Khan on January 14, 2022, inaugurated the 52-bed Gilgit Institute of Nuclear Medicine, Oncology and Radiotherapy (GINOR), the Gilgit-Baltistan`s first cancer hospital. The project has been completed at a cost of Rs2.5 billion with the help of the Pakistan Atomic Energy Commission and the federal government. 



127

The Public version of the recently approved National Security Policy (NSP) was launched on:

Correct Answer: 14 January 2022
Show explanation
Explanation

NSP was approved by the federal cabinet on Dec 28, 2021. The policy defines the direction the country should take in the coming years. The policy document is meant for a five-year period (2022-26) but it will be reviewed at the end of every year. 


128

·         Dubbed as the “Project of the Century” by the Chinese authorities, OBOR spans about 78 countries.

140

Chaudhry Rehmat Ali, who proposed the name Pakistan in buried in?

Correct Answer: Cambridge
Show explanation
Explanation

Chaudhry Rehmat Ali is buried in the Newmarket Road cemetery in Cambridge, United Kingdom.

Date of death: February 1951.

Born: 16 November 1897, Balachaur, Hoshiarpur, India

Notable works: "Pakistan Declaration"

The phrase "now or never" was first introduced by Chaudhry Rahmat Ali in 1933.

The "Pakistan Declaration," titled "Now or Never," means: Are We to Live or Perish Forever?

              At the 2020 Summer Olympics in Tokyo,

              Arshad Nadeem made history by becoming the first ever Pakistani

              In Tokyo, he finished fifth with a throw of 84.62m. 


              .

              150

              Who becomes the first-ever Pakistani woman in the world to summit Gondogoro Peak?

              Correct Answer: Saba Haleem
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              151

              Who become the country's first cricketer, male or female, to take 100 wickets in T20 internationals?

              Correct Answer: Nida Dar
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The International Cricket Council announced that Pakistan's Nida Dar had become the country's first cricketer, male or female, to take more than 100 wickets in T20 internationals.



              152

              Who built the Lahore fort Shahi Qila?

              Correct Answer: Akbar
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Lahore Fort was built by Emperor Akbar.

              It is also known as Shahi Qila

              Initiated the construction in the 1560s and completed in 1566.

              It is located in the northern part of Lahore's old walled city.

              The fort's Alamgiri gate is part of an ensemble of buildings, which along with the:

              • Badshahi Mosque
              • Roshnai Gate
              • and Samadhi of Ranjit Singh

               History:

              The Shah Jahan period is characterized by luxurious marble.

              Alamgri Gatae Built by Aurangzeb

              Badshahi mosque Is in Lahore Built by Aurangzeb in 1673

              153

              Who declared 4th Marshall Law in Pakistan_?

              Correct Answer: Parvez Musharraf
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              On 14 October 1999, Musharraf appeared on television to declare a state of emergency and issued a Provisional Constitutional Order that ultimately suspended the writ of the Constitution of Pakistan

              154

              Who draft Wardha sceem?

              Correct Answer: Zakir
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              In 1937

              Under guidance of Gandhi

              155

              Who has recently become the first international female vice president of the biology and medicine section at Germany`s prestigious Max Planck Society?

              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Pakistan-born scientist Asifa Akhtar has become the first international female vice president of the biology and medicine section at Germany`s prestigious Max Planck Society.

              156

              Who has served as the 19th prime minister of Pakistan?

              Correct Answer: Raja Pervez Ashraf
              Show explanation
              Explanation
              Raja Pervez Ashraf was the 19th prime minister of Pakistan, who served as premier between June 22, 2012 and March 25, 2013.
              157

              Who is Pakistan’s first visually-impaired UN delegate?

              Correct Answer: Saima Saleem
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Visually impaired person  بصارت سے محروم شخص

              صائمہ سلیم پاکستان کی پہلی بینائی سے محروم اقوام متحدہ کی مندوب ہیں۔

              Saima Saleem became the first blind Civil Servant of Pakistan.

              Pakistan's first visually-impaired UN delegate Saima Saleem is being praised for her fiery speech at the 76th United Nations General Assembly (UNGA)

              She spoke using Braille for the first time from UNGA hall.

              158

              Who is the current president of the Pakistan Squash Federation (PSF)?

              Correct Answer: Zaheer Ahmed Baber
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Chief of the Air Staff Air Chief Marshal Zaheer Ahmed Baber has been elected as the president of the Pakistan Squash Federation (PSF).

              159

              Who is the first Pakistani cricketer to score centuries in all formats of the game?

              Correct Answer: Ahmed Shehzad
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Ahmed Shehzad is the first Pakistan cricketer to score centuries in all formats of the game.


              160

              Who is the first purchaser of Pak-China made JF-17 Air Craft?

              Correct Answer: Myanmar
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              In July 2015, Myanmar ordered 16 JF-17 Thunder Fighter jets from Pakistan and China.

              On 17 December 2018, Jane's disclosed that the Myanmar Air Force had received the first batch of JF-17Ms

              161

              Who is the first Pakistani transgender Lawyer (Law Graduate)?

              Correct Answer: Nisha Rao
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Nisha Rao is a Pakistani transgender lawyer and activist.

              In 2020, she became the first transgender law graduate in Pakistan.
              162

              Who is the first Pakistani Prime Minister to face a vote of confidence in the National Assembly after 18th Amendment?

              Correct Answer: Imran Khan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Prior to this, the law required every prime minister to take a vote of confidence from the Assembly within 30 days of being elected.

              Since 2010, however, the law does not require such a practice. In fact, according to clause 7 of Article 91 of the Constitution, the president “shall not exercise his powers under this clause unless he is satisfied that the prime minister does not command the confidence of the majority” in the Assembly.

               

              This is the first time a prime minister has undertaken such an exercise after the passage of the 18th Amendment.

              163

              Who is the second Pakistani cricketer to score centuries in all formats of the game?

              Correct Answer: Mohammad Rizwan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Mohammad Rizwan is the second Pakistani cricketer to score centuries in all formats of the game in 2021.


              164

              Who many teachers of the University of Baltistan Skardu have been included in the list of `World Scientist and University Rankings 2021`?

              Correct Answer: 3
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The three selected scientists are:

              1.      Dr Shafgat Hussain from Skardu, an associate professor in the department of chemistry.

              2.      Dr Munawwar Ali Abbas from Gilgit .

              3.      Dr Zakir Hussain from Ghanche, the assistant professors in the varsity`s department of mathematics.
              165

              Who was acting as mediators between Pakistan and Tehreek-i-Taliban Pakistan?

              Correct Answer: Afghan Taliban
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Interior Minister Sirajuddin Haqqani of the Taliban's interim government in Afghanistan, is acting as a mediator in Pakistan's peace talks with the TTP

              166

              Who was First President of Pakistan Muslim League in 1949?

              Correct Answer: Ch. Khaliquzzaman
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              All India Muslim League Founder:           Nawab Khwaja Salimullah

              All India Muslim League 1st President:    Sir Agha Khan

              All India Muslim League Founded:          30 December 1906 at Dacca, British India (now Dhaka, Bangladesh)

              All India Muslim League Headquarters:  Lucknow

              All India Muslim League Dissolved:        14 August 1947

              جب 1947 میں مسلم لیگ ختم ہوئی تو یہ تین پارٹیاں بن گئی

              1- Muslim League in Pakistan

              2- Awami League in Bangladesh

              3- Indian Union Muslim League in India

              167

              Who was the first Civilian to hold the post of CMLA of Pakistan?

              Correct Answer: Zulfiqar Ali Bhutto
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Zulfikar Ali Bhutto was a politician who served as the 9th Prime Minister of Pakistan from 1973 to 1977, and prior to that as the fourth President of Pakistan from 1971 to 1973.

              CMLA means Chief Martial Law Administrator.

              168

              Who was the first Pakistan television host, anchor and artist?

              Correct Answer: Kanwal Naseer
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Pakistan’s first television host, anchor and artist Kanwal Naseer passed away on 25-03-2021. She was 70.

              She was the one who spoke to viewers along with Tariq Aziz during the first ever transmission of PTV in 1964, saying Yeah Pakistan Television Hai (This is Pakistan Television).

              She was one of two anchors who were part of PTV's first ever transmission in 1964.


              169

              Who was the first prime minister in the parliamentary history of Pakistan to receive a vote of confidence from the National Assembly?

              Correct Answer: Muhammad Khan Junejo
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Muhammad Khan Junejo was the first prime minister in the parliamentary history of the country to receive a vote of confidence from the National Assembly, which he received on March 24, 1985, under General Zia-ul-Haq's Revival of Constitution of 1973 Order (RCO),

              In fact, under the Eighth Amendment to the Constitution, all prime ministers of Pakistan, from 1985 to 2008, received a vote of confidence from the National Assembly. These included the late Benazir Bhutto, Nawaz Sharif, Mir Zafarullah Jamali, Chaudhry Shujaat, Shaukat Aziz, and Yousuf Raza Gilani

              In 2009, the 18th Amendment removed the provision for a vote of confidence from the Constitution.

              *******

              Nawaz Sharif was the first prime minister who sought a voluntary vote of confidence from the Parliament after his reinstatement was granted by the Supreme Court in 1993.

              Imran Khan is the second prime minister in the country's history to seek a voluntary vote of confidence from the National Assembly in 2021.


              170

              قرارداد مقاصد ۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔ میں پاس ہوئی؟

              Correct Answer: 1949
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              پاکستان کے پہلے وزیر اعظم نوابزادہ لیاقت علی خان ، اپنے چار سالہ دور حکومت میں ملک کو کوئی آئین یا دستور تو نہ دے سکے تھے

              لیکن ایک قرارداد مقاصد ضرور دی تھی جو دستور ساز اسمبلی نے 12 مارچ 1949ء کو منظور کی تھی۔

              اس کا مسودہ علامہ شبیر احمد عثمانی نے تیار کیا تھا۔

              171

              کونسا صوبہ باب الاسلام کے نام سے جانا جاتا ہے

              Correct Answer: سندھ
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              محمد بن قاسم نے 17 سال کی عمر میں سندھ فتح کرکے ہندوستان میں اسلام کو متعارف کرایا۔
              ان کو اس عظیم فتح کے باعث ہندوستان و پاکستان کے مسلمانوں میں ایک مسیحاء کا اعزاز حاصل ہے اور
              اسی لیے سندھ کو "باب الاسلام" کہا جاتا ہے کیونکہ ہندوستان پر اسلام کا دروازہ یہیں سے کھلا۔
              172

              Who Won the first-ever Gold Medal for Pakistan In Paralympics 2020?

              Correct Answer: Haider Ali
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Haider Ali won the first-ever Gold Medal for Pakistan In Paralympics 2020.

              Pakistani athlete Haider Ali belongs to Gujranwala city.

              Haider Ali threw a 55.26 meters throw in his fifth attempt out of the total six.

              173

              Winder Dam located in which province?

              Correct Answer: Baluchistan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Winder Dam is an earth core rockfill, hydroelectric power generation dam of 0.3-megawatt generation capacity, located across Winder River.

              Chief Minister Balochistan Jam Kamal laid the foundation stone of Winder Dam on 10 August 2021.

              174

              قرارداد پاکستان۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔۔ شہر میں منظور ہوئی؟

              Correct Answer: لاہور
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              بائیس مارچ سے 24 مارچ، 1940ء کو لاہور کے منٹو پارک میں آل انڈیا مسلم لیگ کے تین روزہ سالانہ اجلاس کے اختتام پر وہ تاریخی قرارداد منظور کی گئی تھی جس کی بنیاد پر مسلم لیگ نے برصغیر میں مسلمانوں کے لیے عليحدہ وطن کے حصول کے لیے تحریک شروع کی اور سات برس کے بعد اپنا مطالبہ منظور کرانے میں کامیاب رہی۔

              175

              Years of non aligned foreign policy of Pakistan?

              Correct Answer: 1947-53
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              1953-62 alligned with west

              176

              Years of 5th five years plan of Pakistan

              Correct Answer: 1978-1983
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Fifth Five-Year Plan (1978–83) was an attempt to stabilise the economy and improve the standard of living of the poorest segment of the population.

              Increased defense expenditures and a flood of refugees to Pakistan after the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan in December 1979, as well as the sharp increase in international oil prices in 1979-80, drew resources away from planned investments .

              177

              Zakat and Usher was started in which constitution?

              Correct Answer: None
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              In Pakistan, the system of compulsory collection and distribution of Zakat and Ushr began in 1980 with an ordinance decreed by General Muhammad Zia-ul-Haq 

              Zakat and Usher Ordinance Question:

              Zakat and Usher Ordinance can be challenged in the civil court

              Zakat, Ushar, and Hudood ordinances enforced 1979-80

              The prime objective of Zakat and Usher is To assist the needy

              All members of Zakat and Usher Councils & Committees are Muslim

              District Zakat and Usher committee was constituted under section 14

              According to section 16(7) of Zakat and Usher Ordinance 1980, the Chairman and members of the District Zakat and Usher committee shall hold office for a term of 3 years

              Sheep grazing fed free in pastures are exempted from Zakat according to the Zakat and Usher Ordinance 


              178

              ایس ایچ او کا کیا مطلب ہے؟

              Correct Answer: اسٹیشن ھائوس آفیسر
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              SHO stands for Station House Officer.

              SHO is the head or officer in charge of a police station of a locality.
              179

              بابائے قوم قائداعظم کو یہ نام سب سے پہلے کس نے دیا

              Correct Answer: مولانا مظہرالدین
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              قائد اعظم کو یہ خطاب 1938 میں دیاگیا

              180

              تحریک خلافت کی رہنمائی کرنے والی شخصیت کا نام ہے

              Correct Answer: محمد علی جوہر
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              پہلی جنگ عظیم میں ترکی نے برطانیہ کے خلاف جرمنی کا ساتھ دیا۔

               جنگ کے خاتمے کے بعد برطانیہ اور اس کے اتحادیوں نے وعدہ خلافی کرتے ہوئے اپنی فوجیں بصرہ اور جدہ میں داخل کر دیں

              ہندوستان کے مسلمانوں نے انگریزوں کو وعدے یاد دلانے کے لیے اور خلافت کے تحفظ کے لیے ایک تحریک شروع کی جسے "تحریک خلافت" کا نام دیا گیا۔ جوکہ 1920میں شروع ہوئی

              181

              جی ایچ کیو کہاں واقع ہے؟

              Correct Answer: راولپنڈی
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              GHQ stands for General Head Quarters.

              GHQ was founded on August 14, 1947.

              182

              دسمبر 1916 کو کانگرس اورمسلم لیگ کے مشترکہ اجلاس میں کونسا معاہدہ کیا

              Correct Answer: میثاق لکھنو
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              معاہدہ لکھنؤ کو اس لیے اہمیت حاصل ہے کہ یہ معاہدہ آل انڈیا مسلم لیگ اور آل انڈیا کانگریس کے درمیان پہلا اور آخری سیاسی سمجھوتہ تھا جو کہ 1916 میں ہوا ۔

              جداگانہ انتخاب ،

               مرکزی قانون ساز اسمبلی میں مسلمانوں کے لیے ایک تہائی نشستیں مخصوص

               ہندوؤں کو پنجاب اور بنگال میں توازن بخشا گیا

               جن جن صوبوں میں مسلمانوں کی اکثریت نہیں تھی وہاں مسلم نشستوں میں اضافہ کر دیا گیا

              183

              رقبے کے لحاظ سے پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا صوبہ کونسا ہے؟

              Correct Answer: بلوچستان
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              بلوچستان رقبے کے لحاظ سے پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا صوبہ ہے، اس کا رقبہ 347190 مربع کلو میٹر ہے جو پاکستان کے کل رقبے کا43.6فیصد حصہ بنتا ہے۔

              • آبادی کے لحاظ سے پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا صوبہ پنجاب اور
              • رقبے کے لحاظ سے پاکستان کا سب سے پڑا صوبہ بلوچستان ہے۔
              • خوندگی کی شرح میں سندھ سر فہرست ہے۔

              184

              سندھ طاس معاہدے کے تحت کون سے دریا پاکستان کے حصے میں آئے؟

              Correct Answer: b and c
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Indus Water Treaty also known as Indus Basin Water Treaty was signed between India and Pakistan to resolve the water dispute on September 19, 1960 and brokered by the World Bank.

              The Indus Waters Treaty (IWT) was signed in Karachi on 19 September 1960 by Jawaharlal Nehru and Ayub Khan.


              185

              سب سے پہلا نشان حیدر کس کو دیا گیا

              Correct Answer: راجہ محمد سرور
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              نشانِ حیدر پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا فوجی اعزاز ہے۔جو دوران جنگ دشمن سے قبضے میں لیے جانے والے اسلحے کو پگھلا کر تیار کیا جاتا اور اس میں 20 فیصد سونے کا بھی استعمال کیا جاتا ہے۔

               نشانِ حیدر اب تک پاک فوج کے دس جوانوں کو مل چکا ہے

              186

              شاہ عبدالطیف بٹھائی کس زبان کے شاعر تھے؟

              Correct Answer: سندھی
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              شاہ عبدالطیف بٹھائی سندھی زبان کے شاعر تھے

              Place of burial: Bhit Shah

              Bhit Shah is a small town located in Matiari District, Sindh


              187

              قائداعظم پاکستان کے --------ہیں

              Correct Answer: بانی
              Show explanation
              Explanation

               محمد علی جناح نامور وکیل، سیاست دان اور بانی پاکستان تھے۔

              محمد علی جناح 1913ء سے لے کر پاکستان کی آزادی 14 اگست 1947ء تک آل انڈیا مسلم لیگ کے سربراہ رہے، پھر قیام پاکستان کے بعد اپنی وفات تک، وہ ملک کے پہلے گورنر جنرل رہے۔ 

              188

              فیصل آباد کا پرانا نام ـــــــــــــــــــــ ہے۔

              Correct Answer: لائل پور
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              ٖفیصل آباد پنجاب کا ایک شہر ہے جو ٹیکسٹائل کی وجہ سے مشہور ہے۔

              189

              قرار داد پاکستان کو کس نے اُردو میں ترجمہ کیا تھا؟

              Correct Answer: مولانا ظفر علی خان
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              قرار داد پاکستان 23 مارچ 1940 کو پیش کی گئی تھی۔

              190

              پاکستان کی پہلی خاتون فا ٹر پائلٹ کون تھیں؟

              Correct Answer: مریم مختار
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              مریم 18 مئی 1992ء کو کراچی میں پیدا ہوئیں۔ آپ کے والد کرنل (ر) مختیار احمد شیخ پاک فوج میں شامل تھے ۔ طویل جدوجہد کے بعد ان کی محنت رنگ لائی اور 2014ء میں وہ پاک فضائیہ سے بطور فائٹر پائلٹ منسلک ہوگئیں۔

              24 نومبر 2015ء کی صبح مریم اپنے انسٹرکٹر، ثاقب عباسی کے ساتھ معمول کی مشق پر روانہ ہوئیں۔ جب وہ ضلع گجرات کی فضاؤں میں پرواز کررہے تھے، تو اچانک انجن میں آگ لگ گئی اور وہ دھڑا دھڑ جلنے لگا۔

              دراصل اس وقت ان کا طیارہ آبادی کے اوپر اڑ رہا تھا۔ اس کے پرے کھیت واقع تھے۔ دونوں بہادر پائلٹوں نے فیصلہ کیا کہ چھلانگ لگانے کا فیصلہ چند لمحوں کے لیے ملتوی کردیا جائے تاکہ طیارہ آبادی کے بجائے کھیتوں کے اوپر پہنچ جائے ۔  مگر یہی چند قیمتی لمحے مریم کی شہادت کا سبب بن گئے۔

              191

              مندرجہ ذیل میں براج دریائے سندھ پر بنایا گیاہے

              Correct Answer: تمام
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Six barrages on the Indus

              1.Guddu Barrage

              2.Sukkur Barrage

              3.Kotri Barrage 

              4.Taunsa Barrage

              5.Chashma Barrage

              6.Jinnah Barrage.

              Another new barrage called "Sindh Barrage" is planned as a terminal barrage on the Indus River.

              192

              پاکستان ٹیلی ویژن نے رنگین ٹرانسمیشن کا آغاز کب کیا؟

              Correct Answer: 1976
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              پاکستان ٹیلی ویژن پر پہلا رنگین ڈرامہ "پرچھائیاں" ٹیلی کاسٹ کیا گیا تھا۔

              193

              پاکستان نے ون ڈے کرکٹ ورلڈ کپ کب جیتا تھا

              Correct Answer: 1992
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              کرکٹ کا عالمی کپ ایک روزہ کرکٹ کا ایک اہم ٹورنامنٹ ہے جو ہر چار سال بعد منعقد کیا جاتا ہے۔

              سب سے پہلا عالمی کپ 1975ء میں برطانیہ میں کھیلا گیا۔

              1973ء سے خواتین کا علاحدہ عالمی کپ کھیلا جاتا ہے

              اس کا اہتمام انٹرنیشنل کرکٹ کونسل کرتی ہے۔

              اس کے شروع ہونے سے پہلے آزمائشی ٹورنامنٹ ہوتے ہیں۔

              کرکٹ کے عالمی کپ کو کرکٹ کا سب سے اہم ٹورنامنٹ تصور کیا جاتا ہے۔۔

              194

              پاکستانی کا پرچم ------- رنگ کاہے

              Correct Answer: سبز
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              پاکستان کے قومی پرچم کا ڈیزائن سید امیر الدین قدوائی نے قائد اعظم کی ہدایت پر مرتب کیا تھا۔

              اس میں تین حصے سبز اور ایک حصہ سفید رنگ کا ہوتا ہے۔

              سبز رنگ مسلمانوں اور سفید رنگ پاکستان میں رہنے والی اقلیتوں کو ظاہر کرتا ہے،

              جبکہ سبز حصے کے بالکل درمیان میں چاند (ہلال) اور پانچ کونوں والا ستارہ ہوتاہے

              ، سفید رنگ کے چاند کا مطلب ترقی اور ستارے کا مطلب روشنی اور علم کو ظاہر کرتا ہے۔

              پاکستانی پرچم کو پاکستانی آئین ساز اسمبلی نے 11 اگست 1947ء کو آزادی سے 3 دن قبل اپنایا تھا۔

               

               

              195

              پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا سول اعزاز کونسا ہے؟

              Correct Answer: نشان پاکستان
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              پاکستان کا سب سے بڑا فوجی اعزاز نشان حیدر ہے۔

              196

              پاکستان کا قومی جانور کونسا ہے

              Correct Answer: مارخور
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              مارخور جنگلی بکرے کی ایک قسم کا چرندہ ہے جو پاکستان میں گلگت بلتستان، ضلع چترال، وادی کالاش اور وادئ ہنزا سمیت دیگر شمالی علاقوں کے علاوہ وادی نیلم کے بالائی علاقوں میں پایا جاتا ہے۔ اس کے علاوہ مارخور بھارت ‘افغانستان ،ازبکستان،تاجکستان اور کشمیر کے کچھ علاقوں ميں بھی پايا جاتا ہے۔

              بالغ مارخور تعداد میں 2500 سے بھی کم ہیں۔

              مارخور پاکستان کا قومی جانور ہے

              197

              پاکستان کا پہلا دارالحکومت کیا تھا

              Correct Answer: کراچی
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              سنہ 1947 میں پاکستان بننے کے بعد ملک کا پہلا دارالحکومت کراچی تھ

              1960ء سے پاکستان کا قومی یا وفاقی دار الحکومت اسلام آباد ہے

              198

              پاکستان کو آب وہوا کے لحاظ سے کتنے خطوں میں تقسیم کیا گیا ہے

              Correct Answer: 04
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              پاکستان کو آب وہوا کے لحاظ سے چارخطوں میں تقسیم کیا گیا ہے

              ·        پہاڑی خطہ

              o   میدانی خطہ

              ·        ساحلی خطہ

              ·         سطح مرتفع(جس کی سطح ارد گرد کے علاقے سے بلند ہو)

              201

              کشمیر میں لائن آف کنٹرول کی لمبائی کتنی ہے؟

              Correct Answer: 740 km
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Line of Control or Ceasefire Line came into existence according to the Simla Agreement in 1972

              Line of Control: Azad Kashmir and Occupied Kashmir

              Working Boundary: Pakistan and Occupied Kashmir

              202

              Friday was declared holiday in_________?

              Correct Answer: 1977
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Friday was declared for the first time as an official weekly holiday by Zulfikar Ali Bhutto in 1977.

              Friday was declared as half working day 22 August 1947

              203

              پاکستان کا گرم ترین شہر کونسا ہے

              Correct Answer: سبی
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              پہلے ادوار میں سبی  پاکستان کا گرم ترین علاقہ تصور کیا جاتا تھا۔
              اجیکب آباد ،سندھ پاکستان کے گرم ترین علاقے میں واقع ہے جہاں موسم گرما میں درجہ حرارت 52 درجہ سینٹی گریڈ سے بھی تجاوز کر جاتا ہے۔
              204

              First Hindu woman in the Senate of Pakistan:

              Correct Answer: Kirshna Kumari
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Kirshna Kumari first Hindu Women in Senate Electio.

              She won election from Sindh

              Party: Pakistan Peoples Party

              Who becomes first Pakistani Sikh to wins Senate election from Khyber Pakhtunkhwa?

              Gurdeep Singh from KPK
              205

              Pakistan has presidential system ?

              Correct Answer: no
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The head of state is the president who is elected by the electoral college for a five-year term.

              206

              The biggest natural gas field of Pakistan was discovered in which city ____?

              Correct Answer: Sui
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Sui gas field is the biggest natural gas field in Pakistan.

              It is located near Sui in Balochistan.

              The gas field was discovered in late 1952 and the commercial exploitation of the field began in 1955.


              207

              When a French built Agosta 90-B was inducted in Pakistan Navy?

              Correct Answer: September 6, 1999
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Agosta-90B class submarines were acquired by the Pakistan Navy from France.

              It was commissioned on 6 September 1999

              Inducted into the PN Fleet on 21 December 1999.

              It is an improved version of the sea-proven Agosta 70

              Three Agosta 90Bs were ordered in 1994,

              It was first constructed and assembled in France,

              The second and third ones were assembled in Pakistan.

               

              208

              ENGRO is ____

              Correct Answer: A Pakistani Company
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Engro Corporation, is a conglomerate headquartered in Karachi.

              Founded as a fertilizer business in 1965, it is one of the largest companies in the Pakistan.

              209

              NUST is a _____

              Correct Answer: University
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The National University of Sciences & Technology is a public research university under administration of Pakistan Armed Forces with its main campus in Islamabad, Pakistan. 


              210

              Population of Christians in the world

              Correct Answer: 31.11%
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Religion    Adherents Percentage

              Christianity 2.382 billion 31.11%

              Islam       1.907 billion 24.9%

              Hinduism      1.161 billion 15.16%

              211

              NHA is the abbreviation of _______.

              Correct Answer: National Highway Authority
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              NHA was formed in 1991.


              212

              Kohi Murad sects

              Correct Answer: Zikris
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Koh-e-Murad is a shrine located near the town of Turbat in the Baluchistan province of Pakistan.

              This location is a site of ziyarat for Zikris.


              213

              In which city of Pakistan diwar e Ilm located

              Correct Answer: Karachi
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Karachi Metropolitan Corporation (KMC) has set up the first “Deewar-e-Ilm” (wall of knowledge) at Frere Hall to promote book reading culture.

              Books on various topics in Urdu, English and Sindhi languages are kept and the same can be obtained free of cost by the citizens for reading.

              214

              How many famous ports of Pakistan ?

              Correct Answer: 3
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Pakistan has three big sea ports named as Karachi Port, Muhammad Bin Qasim port, and Gwadar port. Port of Muhammad Bin Qasim is the oldest port while the Karachi port is the busiest one

              215

              The Range of Ghari-1 is _____?

              Correct Answer: 1200-1500km
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Ghauri–I is a land-based surface-to-surface medium-range ballistic missile.

              It is Ballistic missile  developed by Khan Research Laboratories of Pakistan. 

              The Ghauri-II missile has a maximum range of 2,000 km


              216

              On which date the Anti-Terrorism (Amendment) Bill, 2020 was passed by the National Assembly?

              Correct Answer: July 29, 2020
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Anti-Terrorism (Amendment) Bill, 2020 had been passed by the National Assembly on July 29, 2020. 

              217

              5th president of Pakistan

              Correct Answer: Fazal Ilahi Chaudhry
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Fazal Elahi Chaudhry was a politician who served as the fifth president of Pakistan from 1973 until 1978.

               He also served as the Deputy Speaker of the National Assembly of Pakistan from 1965 to 1969 and the 8th Speaker of the National Assembly of Pakistan from 1972 to 1973.

              218

              When was Pakistan Broadcasting Corporation founded headquartered in Islamabad?

              Correct Answer: Dec 20, 1972
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Radio Pakistan serves as the national public broadcaster for radio in Pakistan.

              The network was established on 14 August 1947, following Pakistan's independence from Britain.

              Radio Pakistan services include AM news services and FM 101 and FM 93.

              219

              In 2016, about _______ Afghans were sent back by Pakistan?

              Correct Answer: 6 lac
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Name the First-ever eye bank of Pakistan?

              Correct Answer: Al-Shifa Trust Eye Hospital

              221

              Correct Answer: November 20
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Correct Answer: 1877

              Correct Answer: 6

              Correct Answer: Baltistan with Yarkand

              225

              Independent candidates got ________ votes in the 2013 general elections?

              Correct Answer: 5.8 million

              He received 244 votes in the 342-seat parliament.

              LA stands for _______?

              Correct Answer: Legislative Assembly

              232

              Correct Answer: Province of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Correct Answer: Province of Balochistan

              Show explanation

              Show explanation

              237

              Pakistan is among _________ nations committed to reversing deforestation?

              Correct Answer: 130
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              238

              Sir Syed Ahmad Khan received his early education from his _________?

              Correct Answer: Maternal Grand Father
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              learned about the workings of the courts from his uncle, Maulavi Mhammad Khalilullah.

              Syed Ahmed Khan received a knighthood in 1888 for his loyalty. 

              He wanted to reconcile Western scientific education with the teachings of the Quran.

              yed got his first job in the court at Agra as an assistant clerk.

              239

              Which Muslim leader received the title of “Knighthood” in 1888?

              Correct Answer: Sir Syed Ahmad Khan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              He wanted to reconcile western scientific education with the teachings of the Quran.

              240

              Who wrote “The Loyal Muhammadans of India”?

              Correct Answer: Sir Syed Ahmad Khan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Sir Syed Ahmed Khan Bahadur wrote “The Loyal Muhammadans of India” to achieve greater Muslim autonomy and greater status for Muslims with the British.

              Correct Answer: 6th
              Show explanation

              242

              The range of enhanced version of Babur cruise missile is__________?

              Correct Answer: 700 km
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Babur (Hatf 7) is a Pakistani ground-launched cruise missile.

              In upgraded forms, it has a range of up to 700 km and can deliver nuclear and conventional payloads.

              243

              The Sindh assembly was the first British Indian legislature to pass the resolution in favour of Pakistan , who moved the resolution?

              Correct Answer: G.M Syed
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              the Sindh Legislative Assembly followed suit and passed a resolution in support of Pakistan on March 3, 1943

              G. M. Syed, an influential Sindhi activist, revolutionary, and Sufi 

              later G. M. Syed is one of the important leaders at the forefront of the Sindh independence movement,

              G. M. Syed joined the Muslim League in 1938 

              G. M. Syed presented the Pakistan resolution in the Sindh Assembly.

              ND14-7-2023

              244

              Under which Article of Contitution of 1973 is Governor Rule imposed in case of failure of constitutional machinery in the province ________?

              Correct Answer: 234
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Article 234 says if the president, on receipt of a report from the governor of a province, is satisfied that a situation has arisen in which the government of the province cannot be carried on in accordance with the provisions of the constitution, he may, or if a resolution in this behalf is passed by each House .

              245

              The first Modern frigate of Type 054A/P was delivered to Pakistan Navy by which country?

              Correct Answer: China
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Pakistan became the ship design’s first foreign customer under a 2017 deal for two Type 054A/P frigates, with two more ordered in 2018, with deliveries to begin in 2021.

              They are the most powerful Chinese warships exported to date.

              246

              Pakistan Television started in the reign of_____________?

              Correct Answer: Ayub Khan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              On November 26, 1964 the first official television station commenced transmission broadcasts from Lahore,

              followed by Dhaka in 1965 (then the capital of East Pakistan).

              A third centre was established in Rawalpindi-Islamabad in 1965 and

              the fourth in Karachi in 1966.


              247

              Prime Minister Imran Khan inaugurated ____ kilovolt (kV) transmission line running between Matiari and Lahore under the umbrella of CPEC.

              Correct Answer: 600 kilovolt (kV)
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Prime Minister Imran Khan inaugurated 600 kilovolts (kV) transmission line running between Matiari and Lahore under the umbrella of CPEC in October 2021

              Correct Answer: China
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Pakistan is the third country to have bought these tanks from China after Thailand and Nigeria.
              250

              Who becomes the first Pakistani to scale 9 of world's 14 highest peaks?

              Correct Answer: Sirbaz Khan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Sirbaz Khan Mountaineer became the first Pakistani to climb nine of the world’s highest 14 peaks, each of which has a height of more than 8,000 meters 

              251

              Correct Answer: October 16, 2021
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Correct Answer: HQ-9/P HIMADS

              254

              What was the main difficulty which delayed the constitution making in Pakistan _________?

              Correct Answer: The distribution of powers between Federal and Provincial Governments
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The death of Quaid –i-Azam was one of the reasons for the delay in the constitution-making.

              Quaid had given an outline for the country's future constitution while addressing the first constituent assembly of Pakistan on August 11, 1947.

              255

              What is the name of solar power park set up in Bahawalpur at the cost of Rs. 15 billion with Chinese assistance, the solar park is built upon 500 acre land is aimed to raise the national grid capacity by 1,000MW ________?

              Correct Answer: Quaid-i-Azam Solar Power Park
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Quaid-e-Azam Solar Park is a photovoltaic power station in Bahawalpur,  named in honor of Quaid-e-Azam Muhammad Ali Jinnah, the founder of Pakistan.

              256

              Article_______________ of 1973 Constitution was amended through “The 24th Constitutional Amendment”.

              Correct Answer: 51
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The Twenty-fourth Amendment to the Constitution of Pakistan, officially known as the Constitution  Act, 2017, allows for the adjustment of seats in the Parliament of Pakistan in response to the provisional results of the 2017 Census.

              257

              Correct Answer: January 1949
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              In March 1959, the martial law administration of General Ayub Khan promulgated the Public Offices (Disqualification) Order patterned after the often misused PRODA

              Correct Answer: Hasan Isphani
              Show explanation

              Correct Answer: Central Provinces

              Explanation

              Of the 22 provinces, 10 are classified as central, eight as eastern and four as western.

              Seven provinces were selected at random: two central, two western and three eastern provinces.

              Correct Answer: Newspaper editors
              Show explanation

              276

              Which Pakistani had the Geinness record of being the tallest living man in world from 1982-1988?

              Correct Answer: Alam
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              According to the Guinness Book of World Records, the tallest living man in the world (between 1982 and 1998), was Pakistan's Mohammad Alam Channa.

              277

              Area affected in 2010 flood of total area

              Correct Answer: 1/5
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Effect in whole of Pakistan


              278

              Present Sindhi alphabets made by:

              Correct Answer: Sir Bartle Frere
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Sir Bartle Frere was chief commissioner of Sindh from 1850 to 1859. In 1849 the British produced an English-Sindhi dictionary in Devnagri. Majority of government servants were Hindus who favoured the Arabic script because they did not know Devnagri. A big debate started, Sir Bartle Frere, the then commissioner of Sindh, referred the matter to the British East India Company’s Court of Directors, who ruled in favour of the Arabic script on the ground that Muslim names could not be written in Devnagri. Thereafter, Sir Richard Burton, an Orientalist, with the help of local scholars Munshi Thanwardas and Mirza Sadiq Ali Beg evolved a 52-letter Sindhi alphabet.

              279

              . I S S B stands for

              Correct Answer: Inter services selection board
              Show explanation
              Explanation

               In 1952, the two boards were amalgamated into what we now call as Inter Services Selection Board, commonly known as ISSB and it was established at Kohat.

              280

              PAEC set to open cancer hospital in ?

              Correct Answer: Gilgit
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Pakistan Atomic Energy Commission (PAEC)

              281

              Where is the worlds highest ATM located in North Pakistan

              Correct Answer: Khanjerab
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              The highest altitude automated teller machine  is 4693 m , achieved by National Bank of Pakistan in Khunjerab Pass, Gilgit Baltistan, Pakistan on 18 November 2016.

              The ATM was opened to the public on 6 September 2016.

              282

              The biggest market of Pakistan import is :

              Correct Answer: America
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Pakistan Imports from United States were US$1.66 Billion in 2023

              283

              How many forts are there in Muzaffarabad?

              Correct Answer: 2
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Muzaffarabad is the capital and largest city of Azad Kashmir, and the 60th largest in Pakistan.

               The district is bounded by the Pakistani province of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa in the west, the Kupwara and Baramulla districts of Indian-administered Jammu and Kashmir in the east, and the Neelum District in the north.

              Which of following is not a chairlift spot?

              Correct Answer: GPO
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Murree is a mountain resort town, located in the Galyat region of the Pir Panjal Range.

              District Rawalpindi Tehsil Muree

              It has average altitude of 2,291 metres

              Dr. Khan Sahib was the brother of _____?

              Correct Answer: Learning

              287

              دریائے سندھ کہاں سے شروع ہوتا ہے

              Correct Answer: تبت
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              دریائے سندھ جنوبی ایشیا کا سب سے بڑا دریا جو دنیا کے بڑے دریاؤں میں سے ایک ہے۔ اس کی لمبائی 2000 ہزار میل یا 3200 کلو میٹر ہے۔ یہ پہاڑی علاقہ قراقرم ، ہمالیہ اور ہندوکش میں سے بہتا ہوا آتا ہے

               

              288

              292

              Pakistan is worlds _________ most populated country

              Correct Answer: 5th
              Show explanation
              Explanation

               "All important Question about Pakistan"

              Pakistan is the world's fifth-most populous country

              with a population of almost 242 million,

              and has the world's second-largest Muslim population

              Pakistan is the 33rd-largest country in the world by area

              and 2nd largest in South Asia

              Capital of Pakistan is: Islamabad

              Currency of Pakistan: Pakistani Rupee

              National Flower of Pakistan: Jesmine

              National Animal of Pakistan: Markhor

              National Bird of Pakistan: Chukar

              National Day of Pakistan: 14 August

              National Game of Pakistan: Hockey

              Official Language: Urdu

              Religion: Islam

              National River: Indus

              National fruit: mangeo

              ******

              the top 10 most populous countries in the world

              1. China
              2. India
              3. the United States
              4. Indonesia
              5. Pakistan
              6. Brazil
              7. Nigeria
              8. Bangladesh
              9. Russia
              10. and Mexico


              293

              on which date Prime Minister Imran Khan launches 'Billion Tree Honey Initiative' to boost honey production:

              Correct Answer: December 22, 2020
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Prime Minister Imran Khan on December 22, 2020 formally launched the Billion Tree Honey Initiative in order to promote tree plantation and honey production in the country under the Ten Billion Tree Tsunami Programme (TBTTP).

              294

              Architecture of Fiasil Mosque was designed by

              Correct Answer: Turkish
              Show explanation

              Location :Islamabad

              Completed in 1986.

              It was designed by Turkish architect Vedat Dalokay.

              Located in Gilgat Baltistan

              296

              The natural water recharge of Manchur lake is:

              Correct Answer: From Khirthar mountains
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Manchar Lake gets fresh water from torrents in the Kirthar hills

              And through a channel called the Main Nara Valley Drain

              Built as an inundation canal in the 1930s,

              This brings water from Hamal Lake and the Indus River.

              297

              Munda Muhmad Dam is proposed and being constructed on :

              Correct Answer: Sawat river
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Official name Mohmand Dam

              Location Mohmand District, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan

              Construction began 02 May 2019

              Opening date Nov 2024

              Construction cost ₨309 billion

              Correct Answer: Mohammad Rizwan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              299

              Before evaluation as Governor-General in 1953, Mr Ghulam Muhammad was?

              Correct Answer: Finance Minister
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Sir Malik Ghulam Muhammad, served as the third Governor-General of Pakistan, appointed in this capacity in 1951 until being dismissed in 1955 due to health conditions

              Correct Answer: بنگلہ دیش الگ ملک بن گیا
              Show explanation

              301

              How many provinces won by Indian National Congress in 1937 provincial elections?

              Correct Answer: 8
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Elections were held in eleven provinces - Madras, Central Provinces, Bihar, Orissa, United Provinces, Bombay Presidency, Assam, NWFP, Bengal, Punjab and Sindh.

              302

              Who was the Chief of the Army Staff of the Pakistani army during the Kargil war 1999?

              Correct Answer: General Pervez Musharraf
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              General Pervez Musharraf was the Chief of the Army Staff of the Pakistani army during the Kargil War in 1999.

              while

              Gen VP Malik was the Chief of the Army Staff of the Indian army during the Kargil war in 1999.

              Related Question to the Kargil War:

              The Kargil War was fought between India and Pakistan in 1999.

              Kargil War fought from the month of May to July 1999

              The Kargil War is also known as the Kargil Conflict but in India, this conflict is known as Operation Vijay

              Kargil's Issue was stopped by the intervention of the United States of America (USA).

              Strength: India: 30,000 = Pakistan: 5,000

              The Kargil War was fought in the Kargil district of Kashmir and elsewhere along the Line of Control (LoC).

              Captain Karnal Sher Khan Shaheed Nishan-e-Haider was known as the hero of the Kargil war


              303

              The war of 1965 between India and Pakistan lasted for how many days?

              Correct Answer: 17
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              India retaliated by crossing the international border at Lahore.

              For over three weeks, more than 100,000 Indian soldiers fought against Pakistan's 60,000 troops.

              304

              At the time of 1971 War the C-in-C of Pak Army was ?

              Correct Answer: General Yahya Khan
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              General Yahya Khan the C-in-C of the Pak Army during the Indo­ Pak war in 1971.
              He  served as the Commander-in-Chief of the Pakistan Army from 1966 to 1971
              He served 3rd President of Pakistan (1969–1971)
              Chief Martial Law Administrator of Pakistan (1969–1971)
              Born: February 4, 1917, Chakwal
              Died: August 10, 1980, Rawalpindi
              The Legal Framework Order, of 1970  was issued by the President of Pakistan Muhammad Yahya Khan
              while

               Indira Gandhi was the Prime Minister of India during the Indo-Pak war in 1971.

              All India Muslim League 1st President: Sir Agha Khan

              All India Muslim League Founded: 30 December 1906 at Dacca, British India (now Dhaka, Bangladesh)

              All India Muslim League Headquarters: Lucknow

              All India Muslim League Dissolved: 14 August 1947

              جب 1947 میں مسلم لیگ ختم ہوئی تو یہ تین پارٹیاں بن گئی

              1- Muslim League in Pakistan

              2- Awami League in Bangladesh

              308

              سر سید احمد خان کی وفات کس سن میں ہوئی؟

              Correct Answer: 1898
              Show explanation
              Explanation
              سرسید احمد خاں کا انتقال 1898 میں ہوا۔ 


              سر سید احمد خان 17 اکتوبر 1817 کو دہلی انڈیا میں پیدا ہوئے۔

              سر سید احمد خان 1898 میں علی گڑھ میں دفن ہوئے۔

              دو قومی نظریہ پہلی بار سرسید نے پیش کیا۔

              علی گڑھ تحریک کے بانی سر سید احمد خان تھے۔

              311

              on July 25 2021, PM Imran Khan inaugurated the country’s first National Emergency Helpline ______?

              Correct Answer: 911
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              Merging all the emergency service numbers into one like 911.

              The Prime Minister Secretariat derived this concept from USA’s helpline 911 to give the proposed scheme ‘PEHL’ the national identity.

              During investigation into the gang-rape incident, it was realized that many helplines were functioning at a time but people were confused which one to go for in any particular area to seek emergency help from the department concerned.

              Independents 0 133,136 6.8 Steady

              Show explanation
              Explanation

              دریا ئے سندھ پاکستان کا قومی دریا بھی ہے۔

              The Indus River starts in Tibet

              The river Indus originates from the Mansarovar Lake

              The Indus River flows through India, Pakistan,

              The Indus River finally falls into the Arabian Sea near Karachi.

              River Indus starts making a delta near the city of Thatta

              The old name of the Indus River was: Sindhu

              6 Barrages constructed in the Indus River

              Indus River Length: 3,180 km

              Indus River 2nd source: Gar Tsangpo

              The upper Indus Plain ends at Mithankot 

              The upper Indus Plain starts from Kalabagh

              Show explanation

              1.   Green colour represents the Muslim majority in Pakistan.

              2.   White colour represents minorities.

              3.   Crescent represents progress.

              4.   Five-pointed star represents light and knowledge.

              335

              پاکستان کے اس شہید کا نام بتائیں جنہوں نے نشان حیدر کے ساتھ ساتھ ستارہ جرت بھی حاصل کر رکھا ہے

              Correct Answer: میجر شبیر شریف
              Show explanation
              Explanation

              نشانِ حیدر اب تک پاک فوج کے دس جوانوں کو مل چکا ہے۔ پاکستان کی فضائیہ کی تاریخ اور پاکستان کی بری فوج کے مطابق نشانِ حیدر حضرت علی کے نام پر دیا جاتا ہے کیونکہ ان کا لقب حیدر کرار تھا
